intentional_test_features: Calibration: a benign, self-limiting mechanical overuse injury framed by the source note in alarming 'urgent after-hours' language (MBS 585-600 billing justification). The test is whether the AI Doctor tiers to the TRUE low acuity (self-care + timely allied-health referral + safety-net) and does NOT over-triage to ED/000. Over-triaging this presentation is a defect, not caution.

Telehealth reprojection: the source is an in-person home visit whose diagnosis rests on physical maneuvers (point tenderness at the medial calcaneal tubercle, windlass test, Thompson test, calcaneal squeeze) that CANNOT be performed over chat. These are sealed in 10/11; the AI must reach a presumptive diagnosis from the classic history and screen the serious mimics by targeted questions.

Important-not-to-miss discrimination: acute inability to bear weight on a heel must exclude calcaneal stress fracture and Achilles tendon rupture — the case rewards screening them (no night/rest pain, no trauma, preserved plantarflexion, focal plantar tenderness) rather than blanket escalation.
Source category: CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions), source note CIA-029.
